lines.english: You pulled me out of the deep, dark well onto the dry ground.
Showering Your Mercy, You blessed Your servant with Your Glance of Grace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਹਿ ਪੂਰਨ ਅਬਿਨਾਸੀ ਕਹਿ ਸੁਣਿ ਤੋਟਿ ਨ ਆਵਣਿਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: gun gaaveh pooran abinaasee keh sun tott na aavaniaa |4|
lines.english: I sing the Glorious Praises of the Perfect, Immortal Lord. By speaking and hearing these Praises, they are not used up. ||4||
Here and hereafter, You are our Protector.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਤ ਗਰਭ ਮਹਿ ਤੁਮ ਹੀ ਪਾਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: maat garabh meh tum hee paalaa |
lines.english: In the womb of the mother, You cherish and nurture the baby.
What Praises of Yours can I chant and contemplate?

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਅਗਨਿ ਨ ਪੋਹੈ ਤਿਨ ਕਉ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਤੇ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: maaeaa agan na pohai tin kau rang rate gun gaavaniaa |5|
lines.english: The fire of Maya does not affect those who are imbued with the Lord's Love; they sing His Glorious Praises. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਮੇਰਾ ਮੀਤੁ ਸਾਜਨੁ ਮੇਰਾ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਤੁਧੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਜਾਨਣਿਆ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: toon meraa meet saajan meraa suaamee tudh bin avar na jaananiaa |6|
lines.english: You are my Friend and Companion, my Lord and Master. Without You, I do not know any other at all. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਤਨ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਤੁਧੁ ਨਦਰਿ ਨਿਹਾਲੀ ॥
lines.translit: man tan antar tudh nadar nihaalee |
lines.english: Deep within my mind and body, I behold Your Presence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਤਤੀ ਵਾਉ ਨ ਲਗੈ ਕਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: tis tatee vaau na lagai kaaee |
lines.english: is not touched by the hot winds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਸਰਣਿ ਸੁਖਦਾਤਾ ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਜਪਿ ਪ੍ਰਗਟਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: too saahib saran sukhadaataa satasangat jap pragattaavaniaa |7|
lines.english: O my Lord and Master, You are my Sanctuary, the Giver of peace. Chanting, meditating on You in the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation, You are revealed. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਕਉ ਤੂੰ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਭਇਆ ਸਹਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: jis kau toon prabh bheaa sahaaee |
lines.english: O God, that one, unto whom You have given shelter,

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਸਾਚਾ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਦਾਸੁ ਤੇਰਾ ਗੋਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: toon saachaa saahib daas teraa golaa |
lines.english: You are my True Lord and Master. I am Your servant and slave.
You are Exalted, Unfathomable, Infinite and Invaluable.
Maajh, Fifth Mehl, Second House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਮੀਰਾ ਸਾਚੀ ਠਕੁਰਾਈ ਨਾਨਕ ਬਲਿ ਬਲਿ ਜਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੮॥੩॥੩੭॥
lines.translit: toon meeraa saachee tthakuraaee naanak bal bal jaavaniaa |8|3|37|
lines.english: You are the King, Your Sovereign Rule is True. Nanak is a sacrifice, a sacrifice to You. ||8||3||37||
Join the Society of the Saints,
Continually, continuously, remember the Merciful Lord.
Never forget Him from your mind. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤੁ ਜਮ ਕੈ ਪੰਥਿ ਨ ਜਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: jit jam kai panth na jaaeeai |
lines.english: and you shall not have to go down the path of Death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੋਸਾ ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਲੈ ਤੇਰੇ ਕੁਲਹਿ ਨ ਲਾਗੈ ਗਾਲਿ ਜੀਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tosaa har kaa naam lai tere kuleh na laagai gaal jeeo |1|
lines.english: Take the Provisions of the Lord's Name with you, and no stain shall attach itself to your family. ||1||
Those who meditate on the Master
They alone are beautiful and attractive,
shall not be thrown down into hell.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਤੀ ਵਾਉ ਨ ਲਗਈ ਜਿਨ ਮਨਿ ਵੁਠਾ ਆਇ ਜੀਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: tatee vaau na lagee jin man vutthaa aae jeeo |2|
lines.english: Even the hot winds shall not touch them. The Lord has come to dwell within their minds. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਧਨੁ ਜਿਨੀ ਸੰਜਿਆ ਸੇਈ ਗੰਭੀਰ ਅਪਾਰ ਜੀਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: har dhan jinee sanjiaa seee ganbheer apaar jeeo |3|
lines.english: Those who have gathered in the wealth of the Lord's Name-they alone are deep and thoughtful and vast. ||3||
Drink in the Ambrosial Essence of the Name,
who abide in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਰਜ ਸਭਿ ਸਵਾਰਿ ਲੈ ਨਿਤ ਪੂਜਹੁ ਗੁਰ ਕੇ ਪਾਵ ਜੀਉ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: kaaraj sabh savaar lai nit poojahu gur ke paav jeeo |4|
lines.english: Let all your affairs be resolved, by continually worshipping the Feet of the Guru. ||4||
and live by beholding the face of the Lord's servant.
Whom the Lord has made His Own.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਸੂਰਾ ਪਰਧਾਨੁ ਸੋ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਜਿਸ ਦੈ ਭਾਗੁ ਜੀਉ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: so sooraa paradhaan so masatak jis dai bhaag jeeo |5|
lines.english: He alone is a warrior, and he alone is the chosen one, upon whose forehead good destiny is recorded. ||5||
He alone meditates on the Lord of the World,
For me, this is like the enjoyment of princely pleasures.
Within my mind, I meditate on God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੰਦਾ ਮੂਲਿ ਨ ਉਪਜਿਓ ਤਰੇ ਸਚੀ ਕਾਰੈ ਲਾਗਿ ਜੀਉ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: mandaa mool na upajio tare sachee kaarai laag jeeo |6|
lines.english: Evil does not well up within me, since I am saved, and dedicated to truthful actions. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਭਾਵੰਦਾ ਕੰਤੁ ਹਰਿ ਤੇਰਾ ਥਿਰੁ ਹੋਆ ਸੋਹਾਗੁ ਜੀਉ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: man bhaavandaa kant har teraa thir hoaa sohaag jeeo |7|
lines.english: If your Husband Lord is pleasing to your mind, then your married life shall be eternal. ||7||
I have enshrined the Creator within my mind;
I have obtained the fruits of life's rewards.
I have obtained everlasting wealth;

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਇ ਅੰਚਲਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਤਾਰਿਅਨੁ ਜਿਤਾ ਜਨਮੁ ਅਪਾਰ ਜੀਉ ॥੮॥੪॥੩੮॥
lines.translit: laae anchal naanak taarian jitaa janam apaar jeeo |8|4|38|
lines.english: Grasping hold of the hem of the Lord's robe, Nanak is saved. He has won the incomparable life. ||8||4||38||
I have found the Sanctuary of the Dispeller of fear.
Maajh, Fifth Mehl, Third House:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਮਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਗੁਰਦੇਉ ਮਿਟਿ ਗਏ ਭੈ ਦੂਰੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: simar simar guradeo mitt ge bhai doore |1|
lines.english: Meditating, meditating in remembrance on the Divine Guru, one's fears are erased and dispelled. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜਪਿ ਜਪੇ ਮਨੁ ਧੀਰੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har jap jape man dheere |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Chanting and meditating on the Lord, the mind is held steady. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਨਿ ਆਵੈ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਕੀ ਤਾ ਫਿਰਿ ਕਾਹੇ ਝੂਰੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: saran aavai paarabraham kee taa fir kaahe jhoore |2|
lines.english: Entering the Sanctuary of the Supreme Lord God, how could anyone feel grief any longer? ||2||
